global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to start binge-watching with a call to action.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and warm base for the ad.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold, white text headline that reads 'Binge starts now' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: A smaller white text below the headline states 'Cancel anytime', providing additional context.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: An abstract arrangement of geometric shapes, including a rectangle and an oval, in a lighter orange hue.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: Another geometric shape, possibly a square, in a similar lighter orange tone, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape in a lighter shade of orange, positioned within the main content area.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now' in white, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The text 'MoonScreen' appears at the top left corner in a bold font, representing the brand.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A clear and inviting button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' appears in the top left corner, possibly indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, key elements include bold text and geometric shapes.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, with the subheadline below it, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, MoonScreen, Shop now, UGC
